---
title: "Visual Artefacts Removal in Volumetric Visualization"
author:
  - name: Peter Mindek
date: "2011-01-01"
categories: [journal article]
citation:
  type: article-journal
  container-title: "Information Sciences and Technologies. Bulletin of the ACM Slovakia"
  volume: 3
  issue: 2
  page: "96-99"
---
